title: liatris graminifolia var. smallii
intro: Liatris graminifolia var. smallii, also known as Small's Blazing Star, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the Liatris genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Liatris graminifolia var. smallii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
